rationale: The only linkage evidence is a single DOI-matched reference with no in-text citation context, so we cannot verify whether the 2003 bundle-choice paper is merely listed or discussed. The citing paper explicitly reviews JMR 1998–2003 articles and tabulates diagnostics, and the cited paper falls in that window, so it could be used as part of that evidence base rather than purely incidental background. Given this sparse and ambiguous evidence, it is not safe to drop confidently.
